title: Word Ladder II
description: Find all shortest transformation sequences from a begin word to an end word using a given dictionary.

title: Longest Increasing Path in a Matrix
description: Return the length of the longest increasing path in an integer matrix, moving only up, down, left, or right.

title: Course Schedule II
description: Return the ordering of courses you should take to finish all courses given their prerequisites. If impossible, return an empty array.

title: Decode String
description: Decode an encoded string where k[encoded_string] means the encoded_string inside the square brackets is repeated exactly k times.

title: Robot Room Cleaner
description: Clean an entire unknown grid-based room using a robot API with move, turnLeft, turnRight, and clean functions.
example: room = [[1,1,1],[1,1,0],[1,1,1]], row = 1, col = 1 -> Cleans all accessible 1s using backtracking API.

title: Text Justification
description: Format a list of words such that each line has exactly maxWidth characters and is fully justified.

title: Merge k Sorted Lists
description: Merge k sorted linked lists and return it as one sorted list.

title: Median of Two Sorted Arrays
description: Find the median of two sorted arrays of sizes m and n with a runtime complexity of O(log(m+n)).

title: Regular Expression Matching
description: Implement regular expression matching supporting '.' for single char and '*' for zero or more of the preceding element.

title: Wildcard Matching
description: Implement wildcard pattern matching with support for '?' (matches any single char) and '*' (matches any sequence of chars).

title: Trapping Rain Water
description: Compute how much water an elevation map can trap after raining.

title: Trapping Rain Water II
description: Given a 2D elevation map, find the volume of water it can trap after raining.

title: Sliding Window Maximum
description: Return the max element inside a sliding window of size k moving from left to right across an array.

title: Longest Valid Parentheses
description: Find the length of the longest valid (well-formed) parentheses substring.

title: Edit Distance
description: Find the minimum number of operations (insert, delete, replace) required to convert one word to another.

title: Maximal Rectangle
description: Find the area of the largest rectangle containing only 1s in a 2D binary matrix.

title: The Skyline Problem
description: Given the locations and heights of buildings, return the skyline formed by these buildings collectively.

title: Count of Smaller Numbers After Self
description: Return an integer array where counts[i] is the number of smaller elements to the right of nums[i].

title: Remove Duplicate Letters
description: Remove duplicate letters so that every letter appears once and the result is the smallest lexicographical order possible.

title: Longest Substring with At Most K Distinct Characters
description: Find the length of the longest substring of a string s that contains at most k distinct characters.

title: Find Median from Data Stream
description: Design a data structure that supports adding numbers from a data stream and finding the median dynamically.

title: Serialize and Deserialize Binary Tree
description: Design an algorithm to serialize a binary tree into a string and deserialize that string back to the original tree structure.
example: root = [1,2,3,null,null,4,5] -> serialized string -> deserialized to match original root

title: Number of Islands II
description: Perform a series of position updates on a 2D grid, dynamically counting the number of distinct islands after each land addition.

title: Range Sum Query 2D - Mutable
description: Implement a 2D matrix class supporting element updates and dynamic submatrix sum queries.
example: update(3, 2, 6), sumRegion(2, 1, 4, 3) -> Returns correct subgrid sum efficiently.

title: Best Time to Buy and Sell Stock IV
description: Find the maximum profit you can achieve by completing at most k stock buy-sell transactions.

title: Burst Balloons
description: Burst balloons conditionally to maximize the coins gained, where bursting balloon i gives nums[i-1] * nums[i] * nums[i+1] coins.

title: Remove Invalid Parentheses
description: Remove the minimum number of invalid parentheses to make the input string valid, returning all unique valid outputs.

title: Insert Delete GetRandom O(1) - Duplicates allowed
description: Design a data structure that allows insertion, deletion, and randomized extraction of an item all in average O(1) time.
example: insert(1), insert(1), insert(2), getRandom() -> returns 1 with 2/3 probability, 2 with 1/3 probability.

title: LRU Cache
description: Design a Least Recently Used (LRU) cache with get and put operations in O(1) time complexity.
example: put(1, 1), put(2, 2), get(1), put(3, 3) -> evicts key 2.

title: LFU Cache
description: Design a Least Frequently Used (LFU) cache operating in O(1) time complexity for access and updates.
example: put(1,1), put(2,2), get(1), put(3,3) -> evicts key 2 due to lower frequency count.

title: Design Search Autocomplete System
description: Design a real-time search autocomplete engine that matches typed prefixes with historic top-ranked queries.
example: input('i') -> top 3 sentences starting with 'i'; input('a') -> updates prefix to 'ia' and returns suggestions.

title: Split Array Largest Sum
description: Split an array into m non-empty continuous subarrays such that the minimized maximum sum among these subarrays is achieved.

title: Frog Jump
description: Determine if a frog can cross a river by stepping on consecutive stones, given that its next jump distance must be k-1, k, or k+1 units.

title: All O`one Data Structure
description: Design a data structure storing string keys with increment/decrement APIs, supporting retrieval of max and min keys in O(1) time.

title: Minimum Window Substring
description: Find the minimum substring window in s that contains all characters present in string t.

title: Basic Calculator
description: Evaluate a mathematical string expression containing brackets, unary operators, addition, and subtraction.

title: Basic Calculator III
description: Implement a strong expression calculator capable of handling non-negative integers, '+', '-', '*', '/' operators and parentheses.

title: Cracking the Safe
description: Find the shortest string that contains all possible password combinations of length n using a specific alphabet size k.

title: Open the Lock
description: Find the minimum number of total turns required to open a combination lock from '0000' to a target string without hitting 'deadends'.

title: Network Delay Time
description: Calculate the minimum time it takes for all nodes in a network to receive a signal sent from a starting node k.

title: Cheapest Flights Within K Stops
description: Find the cheapest price path from a source to a destination with at most k stops.

title: Sliding Puzzle
description: Find the least number of puzzle tile moves required to solve a 2x3 board configuration to state [[1,2,3],[4,5,0]].

title: Bus Routes
description: Find the least number of multi-stop buses you need to take to travel from a source to a target station.

title: Race Car
description: Find the minimum length of an instruction sequence consisting of 'A' (Accelerate) and 'R' (Reverse) to reach a target position.

title: Expressive Words
description: Determine how many source words can be extended via character repetitions to perfectly match a target query string.

title: Find And Replace in String
description: Perform multiple independent text replacement operations on specified index locations of a source string.

title: Sum of Distances in Tree
description: Return an array answer where answer[i] is the sum of the distances between the i-th node and all other nodes in a tree.

title: Similar String Groups
description: Given an array of anagram strings, group them such that strings connected by zero or two character swaps belong to the same group. Count total groups.

title: Hand of Straights
description: Determine if a collection of hand cards can be completely re-arranged into groups of size groupSize containing consecutive cards.

title: Car Fleet
description: Calculate how many distinct car fleets will arrive at a common destination road marker given initial distances and maximum speeds.

title: Exam Room
description: Design an exam room row maximizes the seating separation distance to the closest active student every time seat() is invoked.

title: Shortest Path to Get All Keys
description: Find the fewest total moves to collect all keys on a 2D grid containing walls, locks, keys, and open pathways.

title: Minimum Cost to Hire K Workers
description: Hire k workers from a pool matching a strict minimum wage expectation ratio while minimizing the overall total capital cost.

title: Koko Eating Bananas
description: Find the minimum integer eating speed per hour k that allows Koko to consume all banana piles within an overall limit hour allowance h.

title: Length of Longest Fibonacci Subsequence
description: Given a strictly increasing array of positive integers, return the length of the longest Fibonacci-like subsequence.

title: Profit Schemes
description: Calculate the total number of subsets of crimes that can be committed using at most n members while generating at least minProfit units.

title: Reachable Nodes In Subdivided Graph
description: Calculate the total number of atomic nodes reachable within maxMoves starting from node 0 on an edge-subdivided graph network.

title: Super Egg Drop
description: Determine the minimum number of target test drops needed to confidently identify the critical threshold floor f out of n total building floors using k eggs.

title: Cat and Mouse
description: Simulate a turn-based graph traversal game to evaluate if the Mouse escapes, the Cat catches the Mouse, or the game ends in a perpetual draw.

title: Minimum Cost to Merge Stones
description: Find the minimum cost to merge consecutive piles of stones into exactly one pile by combining precisely k adjacent piles at a time.

title: Grid Illumination
description: Manage grid-based lamp positions that illuminate corresponding row, column, and diagonal cells, responding dynamically to cell checks and localized switch-offs.

title: Shortest Way to Form String
description: Find the minimum number of complete subsequence readings of a source string required to reconstruct a target string.

title: Confusing Number II
description: Count how many integers within a 1-to-n numeric range turn into a valid but different valid number when rotated 180 degrees.

title: Campus Bikes
description: Assign bikes to campus workers by prioritizing the absolute closest Manhattan distance coordinates, breaking ties with smallest index properties.

title: Campus Bikes II
description: Assign bikes to campus workers such that the total sum of Manhattan distance pathways across all assignments is minimized.

title: Optimize Water Distribution in a Village
description: Supply water to all houses in a village by building wells inside houses or connecting pipes across them to minimize costs.

title: Web Crawler Multithreaded
description: Design a multithreaded asynchronous web crawler system that extracts links from a starting hostname safely under concurrency constraints.
example: startUrl = 'http://news.google.com', htmlParser API -> Extracts linked URLs from the same domain concurrently.

title: Maximum Profit in Job Scheduling
description: Find the maximum profit you can make by scheduling non-overlapping jobs specified by start, end, and profit attributes.

title: Synonymous Sentences
description: Generate all possible text variations of a sentence by replacing text tokens with all known synonymous word equivalents in alphabetical order.
example: synonyms = [['happy','joy']], text = 'I am happy' -> ['I am happy', 'I am joy']

title: Design Underground System
description: Track passenger check-in and check-out events across train stations to efficiently report average travel times between targeted pairs.

title: Max Dot Product of Two Subsequences
description: Return the maximum dot product of non-empty subsequences of two arrays of identical or differing sizes.

title: Cherry Pickup II
description: Find the maximum number of items two robots starting at grid locations (0,0) and (0, cols-1) can accumulate moving downward together.

title: Allocate Mailboxes
description: Place k mailboxes along a single-dimensional street configuration such that the overall sum of distances to adjacent houses is minimized.

title: Parallel Courses II
description: Find the minimum number of academic semesters required to complete n courses under prerequisites constraints when taking at most k courses simultaneously.

title: Number of Ways to Reorder Array to Get Same BST
description: Find the total number of permutations of an array that yield a structurally identical Binary Search Tree (BST) ordering.

title: Minimum Cost to Connect Two Groups of Points
description: Find the minimum financial cost to establish a system of connecting links such that every single element across two independent point groups is connected.

title: Rank Transform of a Matrix
description: Calculate a rank allocation matrix maintaining relative cell value structures where identical items on shared rows or columns possess matching rankings.

title: Fancy Sequence
description: Implement a sequence storage engine supporting dynamic values updates via append, addition increments, scale multiplications, and fast index querying.

title: Create Sorted Array Through Instructions
description: Build an ordered array insertion sequence tracking total cost metrics defined by checking minimal and maximal bound values counts during entries.

title: Checking Existence of Edge Length Limited Paths
description: Answer offline edge queries to confirm if valid node connectivity paths exist entirely within limited network travel distance constraints.

title: Number of Ways to Reconstruct a Tree
description: Determine if a unique tree structure, multiple trees, or no structural trees can be accurately mapped to fit a given pairs graph configuration.

title: Maximum Score from Performing Multiplication Operations
description: Maximize the scoring returns gathered by picking integers from either the extreme front or end locations of an array over m specific rounds.

title: Shortest Path Visiting All Nodes
description: Find the shortest route length that visits every single node in an undirected graph at least once.

title: Find the Shortest Superstring
description: Given an array of strings, find the shortest string that contains each string in the array as a substring.

title: Prefix and Suffix Search
description: Design a data structure that supports searching words matching a specific prefix and suffix using a single query method.

title: Employee Free Time
description: Given schedules of multiple employees, return the list of finite intervals representing common non-overlapping free time across everyone.

title: Stickers to Spell Word
description: Find the minimum number of sticker collections needed to cut out and spell a target word.

title: Cheapest Flights Within K Stops
description: Find the absolute lowest price to travel from an origin point to a target node utilizing at most k stops along the journey.

title: Subarrays with K Different Integers
description: Return the total count of good continuous subarrays containing exactly k unique integer values.

title: Brace Expansion II
description: Evaluate a string-based set formatting language to parse comma elements and nested curly brackets into a unique sorted strings list.

title: Parsing A Boolean Expression
description: Return the logical truth evaluation of an expression combining boolean literals ('t','f') and operators ('!', '&', '|').

title: Range Module
description: Design a system tracking half-open continuous intervals that allows tracking addRange, queryRange, and removeRange allocations effectively.

title: Number of Atoms
description: Count the occurrence quantities of distinct atoms present inside a nested parenthesized chemical formula string outputting them in alphabetical order.

title: Valid Permutations for DI Sequence
description: Return the total number of integer array permutations matching a specific up-down trend direction rule constraint string.

title: Word Search II
description: Given a 2D board of characters and a list of words, find all words on the board.

title: Binary Tree Maximum Path Sum
description: Find the maximum path sum between any two nodes in a binary tree.

title: Longest Duplicate Substring
description: Find the longest duplicate substring of a string s using a runtime faster than O(N^2).

title: Number of Ways to Form a Target String Given a Dictionary
description: Form a target string using string columns out of a word dictionary index list tracking valid combinations using dynamic programming.

title: Smallest Sufficient Team
description: Find the absolute smallest subset team of people that collectively possesses all necessary target skill attributes requested.

title: Critical Connections in a Network
description: Find all critical paths (bridges) in a network whose complete deletion would disconnect the underlying server graph connectivity.
example: n = 4, connections = [[0,1],[1,2],[2,3],[3,0]] -> [] (No unique critical connection bridges exist)

title: Design a Text Editor
description: Implement a performance-optimized text editing simulation engine that handles dynamic additions, cursor shifting, and character backspacing workflows.
example: addText('leetcode'), cursorLeft(4), deleteText(2) -> Returns characters count cleared.

title: Stone Game VIII
description: Evaluate an optimal multi-round consecutive array stone value accumulation strategy to maximize final competitive scores outcomes.

title: Minimum Window Subsequence
description: Find the minimal length substring window context within string s1 that maps to string s2 as a contiguous subsequence.

title: Grid Game
description: Simulate a two-player competitive points collection run descending across a 2-row matrix grid layout to calculate localized optimal scores paths.

title: Swim in Rising Water
description: Find the least total time step threshold required to navigate from coordinates (0,0) to grid destination (n-1, n-1) as platform waters rise layout.

title: Contain Virus
description: Prioritize and build protective containment wall grids to separate active mutating virus colonies fields while minimizing maximum overall layout spreads.

title: Maximum Vacations Weeks
description: Calculate the absolute maximum flight hops allocation roadmap across multi-city branches loops to maximize overall vacation work cycles metrics.

title: Split Array into Consecutive Subsequences
description: Determine if an input array sequence can be completely divided into independent sets containing consecutive numbers of size at least 3.

title: Count Different Palindromic Subsequences
description: Find the total count of distinct non-empty palindromic subsequences within a string s.

title: Maximum Performance of a Team
description: Select at most k workers from available candidate pools to maximize efficiency scaling performance scores outputs.

title: Count Vowels Permutation
description: Calculate how many valid string structures of length n can be completely formed under strict vowel character pairing rules.

title: Minimum Number of Refueling Stops
description: Find the fewest total refueling station stops needed to reach a targeted position threshold map.

title: Escape a Large Maze
description: Determine if a starting node coordinate can successfully reach a target destination block across immense matrix layouts populated with few obstacle points blocks.

title: Burst Balloons
description: Formulate optimal continuous element removal schedules to maximize overall scores outputs.

title: Tallest Billboard
description: Construct two symmetric billboard steel structures using fixed available support beams rods lengths to reach the highest uniform height balance.

title: Find Kth Smallest Pair Distance
description: Calculate the k-th smallest absolute difference value distance generated across all unique element number pairs pairings sets.

title: Strong Password Checker
description: Calculate the minimal total character adjustment operations steps (insert, remove, change) to enforce a strict password security schema rule.

title: Preimage Size of Factorial Zeroes Function
description: Determine how many non-negative integers x satisfy the trailing zero counts rule criteria requested by a factorial evaluation method.

title: Reconstruct Itinerary
description: Reconstruct a complete flight path travel layout tracking itinerary entries alphabetically starting out from an initial 'JFK' airport code node reference.

title: Minimum Interval to Include Each Query
description: Identify the absolute shortest length interval tracker block scope matching query input conditions across multi-range data arrays entries.

title: Maximum Alternating Subsequence Sum
description: Calculate the highest alternating value aggregation result output attainable across element configurations branches options lists.

title: Kth Smallest Product of Two Sorted Arrays
description: Find the k-th smallest multiplication product value pair outcome computed by crossing elements pairs combinations across separate input blocks data lists.

title: Longest Common Subpath
description: Identify the absolute maximum length shared contiguous path array sub-sequence common to all multi-route track logs records entries.

title: Process Tasks Using Servers
description: Simulate real-time task thread priority allocations handling server weight properties to queue tasks efficiently inside modern backend data streams models.

title: Minimum Unique Word Abbreviation
description: Generate the shortest unique character compression abbreviation string token layout for a target query that remains completely distinct from a dictionary word collection.

title: Number of Music Playlists
description: Calculate total valid music playlist song sequences permutations possible matching strict duration spacing playback constraint rules blocks setups.
